---
title: "blog"
listing:
  contents: "../posts/**/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description, image]
  image-align: right
  include:
    lang: en
---

:::{.language-selector}
[Tiếng Việt](blog.qmd){.lang-tab}
[English](blog-en.qmd){.lang-tab .active}
[日本語](blog-ja.qmd){.lang-tab}
:::

:::{.page-intro}
All published posts in English, sorted by newest first.
:::
